---
title: "Assignment_2"
author: "Munisa"
date: "2026-03-23"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r airquality}

head(airquality)
good<-complete.cases(airquality)
good[1:6]
airquality_cleaned<-airquality[good,]
head(airquality_cleaned)


```
## Cleaning dataset airquality from NA values

**airquality_dataset** is used to complete assignment.
Using _complete_cases_ complete rows were identified and cleaned new dataset **_airquality_cleaned_** was created that doesnt contain missing values
